overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval harbor town. The character moves from wooden docks through stone courtyards and narrow alleys before returning to the bustling waterfront with docked sailing ships and patrolling guards.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden harbor dock with large water wheel

events.description: approaching and entering stone archway from wooden dock into courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wooden dock passing large water wheel structure on the right

notable_agents.action: person sitting on wooden bench near building entrance

entered.detail: large wooden water wheel structure with multiple buckets
tall stone tower with red conical roof visible in the distance
weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway
stone archway entrance with red roof tiles leading into courtyard
coiled rope piles stacked on the wooden dock

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny wooden harbor dock with a large water wheel dominating the right side. Geralt walks forward toward a stone archway entrance, passing rope piles and weathered wooden planks. A person sits on a bench to the left as the character approaches the transition into the courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: stable courtyard with horses and wooden fencing

events.description: moving into shaded courtyard area with significantly reduced sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone courtyard passing stable areas with horses

notable_agents.action: horses standing within fenced stable enclosure

entered.detail: tall stone walls forming the courtyard enclosure
rustic wooden picket fence surrounding stable area
wooden stable building with open front for horses

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the archway, the scene shifts to a shaded cobblestone courtyard with stone walls and a stable area. Horses stand behind wooden fencing to the right. The lighting becomes noticeably dimmer as the character moves deeper into the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone alley between tall stone buildings

events.description: child runs past from behind and overtakes the character in the alley

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alley between tall timber and stone buildings

notable_agents.action: child running quickly through the alley overtaking the character

entered.detail: tall medieval stone buildings with narrow windows flanking the alley
half-timbered building with exposed wooden beams and plaster
stone archway at end of alley leading to waterfront

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, shadowy cobblestone alley flanked by tall stone and timber-framed buildings. A child runs past from behind, overtaking Geralt as he approaches a distant stone archway that leads to the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront dock with sailing ships

events.description: exits narrow alley through stone archway into bright open waterfront area
emerging from shade into direct sunlight on the waterfront dock

agents.ego_description: walking out of the confined alley onto the bustling waterfront dock

notable_agents.action: dock workers sitting on wooden planks near the water's edge

entered.detail: large sailing vessels with red and white striped sails docked at harbor
wooden dock crane structure for loading cargo
stone and timber buildings lining the waterfront promenade

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the narrow alley through a stone archway into a bright, open waterfront area. Large sailing ships with striped sails are docked to the left, while dock workers sit near the water. The lighting shifts dramatically from shaded to full sunlight.

events.description: passing close to guards in red uniforms temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront passing groups of guards and dock workers

notable_agents.action: guards in red uniforms with halberds patrolling the dock area

entered.detail: wooden scaffolding structure along the dockside

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt walking along the bustling waterfront promenade, passing guards in distinctive red uniforms carrying halberds. The dock crane shifts to the left as the character moves forward, and wooden scaffolding becomes prominent along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunny harbor dock through a series of shaded urban corridors before emerging back into a bright, bustling waterfront. It begins on weathered wooden planks beside a large water wheel, moving forward past rope piles and a seated figure toward a stone archway. As the camera passes through the arch, the scene shifts into a dimmer, shaded cobblestone courtyard with horses behind wooden fencing, before narrowing further into a shadowy alley flanked by tall timber-framed buildings. The environment then opens up dramatically as the character exits a second archway, with the lighting shifting from deep shade to full sunlight over a vista of docked sailing ships with striped sails. Finally, the camera glides along the waterfront promenade, passing guards in red uniforms and wooden scaffolding as the harbor activity expands around the character.
